## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] New/changed public functions have type hints and docstrings with units
- [ ] Any new index or formula cites its source in the docstring
- [ ] Added a test (for a new index, pin an expected value to a cited reference)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
